chap_title: ARE' UXE' OJER TZIJ WARAL K'ICHE' UB'I'
eng_trans: This is the first ancient word here in K’iche’ language.

chap_title: ARE UTZIJOXIK WA'E
eng_trans: This is its account.

chap_title: TA XWINAQIR K'U RI ULEW KUMAL
eng_trans: Then the earth was formed.

chap_title: K'EJE K'UT UTIJTOB'EXIK CHIK WINAQ TZ'AQ,
eng_trans: Thus, humanity was created again,

chap_title: K'ATE K'UT UB'IXIK RI' CHI KECH RI E NIK'WACHINEL,
eng_trans: Thus, their words were spoken to those who gave them guidance,

chap_title: K'ATE K'UT KIK'ISIK CHIK,
eng_trans: Then their destruction came again,

chap_title: ARE K'UT XA JUB'IQ' SAQNATANOJ UWACH ULEW,
eng_trans: And the surface of the earth was cleansed.

chap_title: K'EJE K'UT XCHIQAB'IJ CHIK TA XKAMIK WUQUB' KAK'IX,
eng_trans: Thus, they said again when Wuqub' Kaq'ix was killed.

chap_title: WA'E CHI K'UTE UB'ANOJ CHIK SIPAKNA,
eng_trans: This was also when Sipakna was destroyed.

chap_title: ARE CHIK UCH'AKATAJIK,
eng_trans: Another was struck down,

chap_title: JUN CHI K'UT XCHIQAB'IJ UB'IXIK
eng_trans: Then again was spoken the word,

chap_title: ARE CHI K'UT XCHIQAB'IJ CHIK UB'I' KIQAJAW RI JUNAJPU,
eng_trans: Then again was spoken of the lords Junajpu,

chap_title: ARE CHI K'UT XCHIQAB'IJ CHIK KIB'E'IK CHI XIB'ALB'A
eng_trans: Then again was spoken of their descent into Xibalba

chap_title: K'ATE PUCH TA XEB'EK JUN JUNAJPU, WUQUB' JUNAJPU.
eng_trans: Thus, Jun Junajpu and Wuqub' Junajpu set out.

chap_title: K'ATE K'UT XE'OPONIK PA Q'EQUMA JA,
eng_trans: Then they arrived at the Dark House,

chap_title: WA CHI K'UTE UTZIJOXIK JUN Q'APOJ,
eng_trans: This was when a challenge was completed,

chap_title: ARE K'UTE K'O RI UCHUCH JUN B'ATZ', JUN CHOWEN,
eng_trans: Thus, the birth of Jun B’atz’ and Jun Chowen.

chap_title: ARE CHIK XCHIQATZIJOJ KALAXIK JUNAJPU, SXB'ALANKE.
eng_trans: And then the twins Junajpu and Xbalanque were strengthened.

chap_title: TA XEB'E K'UT CHILA' CHUXE' CHE', Q'ANTE' UB'I';
eng_trans: Then they went toward the great trees, the pines.

chap_title: K'ATE K'UT XUKAQ'AT ULA CH'O RI KIK'
eng_trans: Then they were lifted up into the sky as the sun and the moon.

chap_title: TA XEPE K'UT NIMA JOK K'U KIB'E RI K'AJOLAB' CHI KOCHOCH,
eng_trans: Then their sons took the great road to their home.

chap_title: TA XEB'E K'UT,
eng_trans: Then they departed.

chap_title: K'ATE K'UT TA XE'OK PA Q'EQUMA JA,
eng_trans: Then they entered the Dark House.

chap_title: ARE K'UT WA'E KINAB'AL, KIKAMIK JUNAJPU, XB'ALANKE
eng_trans: This was when Junajpu and Xbalanque died.

chap_title: K'ATE PUCH URAYINIK, UMALINIK PU KIK'UX AJAWAB' CHI RE KIXAJOJ XJUNAJPU, XB'ALANKE.
eng_trans: Thus, their hearts remained calm and content with their fate.

chap_title: WA'E K'UT UTIKERIK TA XNA'OJIX WINAQ, TA XTZUKUX PUCH RI CHOK UTYO'JIL WINAQ
eng_trans: This was the moment of humanity’s knowledge and the beginning of its wisdom.

chap_title: WA'E KIB'I NAB'E WINAQ XETZ'AQIK, XEB'ITIK:
eng_trans: These were the first people to be created, to be formed.

chap_title: ARE K'UT UXE' QECH, RI OJ K'ECHE' WINAQ
eng_trans: Thus, we are their descendants, we, the K’iche’ people.

chap_title: ARE K'UT UB'I' JUYUB' WA',
eng_trans: Thus, the mountains were named.

chap_title: WA'E K'UTE' USAQIRIK, UWACHINIK PUCH Q'IJ, IK',
eng_trans: This was when the sun and the moon rose and shone.

chap_title: WA K'UTE' KIK'ATONIK,
eng_trans: This was when the burdens were taken up.

chap_title: WA'E UTIKARIK CHIK RELEQ'AXIK WINAQ, AMAQ' kumal B'alam Kitze'
eng_trans: This was the establishment of people and nations by B'alam Kitze'.

chap_title: ARE K'U WA' UK'AMIK UNA'OJ AMAQ'
eng_trans: This was the burden of governance over the nations.

chap_title: K'ATE PUCH XEB'EK,
eng_trans: Then they departed.

chap_title: WA'E K'UTE KIMOLOWIK KIB' KONOJEL AMAQ',
eng_trans: This was when all the nations were gathered together.

chap_title: ARE CHIK WI XCHIQAB'IJ CHIK KIKAMIK B'alam Kitze'
eng_trans: Thus, again was spoken of the death of B’alam Kitze'.

chap_title: K'ATE PUCH TA XKIK'UXLAJ KIB'IK
eng_trans: Then their names were made sacred again.

chap_title: TA XE'UL CHI K'U CHIRI'
eng_trans: Then they arrived there.

chap_title: WA'E K'UTE KIB'I' AJAWAB' CHUWACH KAWIQIB'.
eng_trans: This was when the lords stood before the Kaweq.

chap_title: ARE CHI K'U AJAWAB' WA' CHUWACH NIJA'IB'AB':
eng_trans: These were the lords before the Nija’ib’ab'.

chap_title: ARE CHI K'UT AJAW K'ICHE' WA'.
eng_trans: These were the lords of the K’iche’.

chap_title: KA'IB' CHINAMIT CHI NAY PUCH SAQIKIB' AJAWAB':
eng_trans: Two settlements were with the Saqikib’ lords.

chap_title: WA' CHI K'UTE KIB'I' CHIK UWAQ LE' AJAW,
eng_trans: This was when the lords took up the burden.

chap_title: ARE K'UT XCHIQAB'IJ CHIK UB'I' ROCHOCH KAB'AWIL
eng_trans: Thus, they spoke again of the divine house.

chap_title: ARE CHI K'UT XCHIQACHOLO ULE'EL AJAWAB' RUK' KIB'I' KONOJEL AJAWAB' XCHIQAB'IJ CHIK
eng_trans: Thus, the lords assembled and addressed all the rulers.

chap_title: ARE CHI XCHIQAB'IJ CHIK RE CHINAMIT,
eng_trans: Thus, they spoke again of the city.

chap_title: ARE UB'INA'M WI B'ELEJEB' CHINAMIT CHI KAWIQIB',
eng_trans: The first great city of the Kaweq was known as B’elejeb’.

chap_title: WA K'UTE RECH NIJA'IB'AB'
eng_trans: This was the name of the Nija’ib’ab'.

chap_title: ARE CHIK XCHIQAB'IJ RAJAWAL JUJUN CHI NIM JA:
eng_trans: Thus, they spoke of the greatness of each great house.

chap_title: ARE CHI K'UT RECH AJAW K'ICHE'
eng_trans: Thus, they spoke of the K’iche’ kingdom.

chap_title: ARE K'U RI E OXIB' CHI NIM CHOKOJ
eng_trans: Thus, these were the three great arrivals.
